template.label: Pitch Deck Proposal
template.description: Premium proposal deck for chatbot concepts, design, rollout, and commercial discussion.

project.subtitle: A conversational assistant that feels premium, helpful, and on-brand.
project.objective: Design and launch an animated chatbot experience that improves response speed and lead quality.

clientSituation: Notso Demo support and pre-sales requests are handled manually and slowly.
Users on https://www.notso.ai do not get immediate guided answers for high-intent questions.
Current chatbot behavior feels static and under-represents the brand quality.
conceptPillars: An animated assistant that reflects Notso AI's personality and communication style.
Structured intent paths for discovery, qualification, and support resolution.
Prompt/content system that can be updated fast without reworking the whole UX.
experienceDesign: Premium motion language with smooth entrance and clear state transitions.
Low-cognitive-load layout: concise prompts, progressive disclosure, decisive CTA placement.
Accessibility-first defaults for contrast, keyboard flow, and reduced motion.
conversationDesign: Welcome sequence introduces value and routes users in two turns.
Intent map covers product discovery, pricing qualification, and support triage.
Escalation path hands over transcript and context to a human operator.
architecture: Shared conversation layer across website widget and in-product assistant.
Editable knowledge base and scripted prompts managed through a lightweight CMS.
Analytics instrumentation for completion rates, escalations, and conversion impact.

designOptions.title: Option A - Playful Guide
designOptions.description: Rounded mascot with expressive gestures and optimistic tone.

designOptions.title: Option B - Premium Concierge
designOptions.description: Refined avatar, elegant transitions, and restrained palette.

designOptions.title: Option C - Product Expert
designOptions.description: Utility-first interaction model with speed-focused visuals.

timeline.title: Week 1-2
timeline.description: Discovery, benchmarks, and measurable KPI definition.

timeline.title: Week 3-4
timeline.description: Visual direction and conversation prototype sign-off.

timeline.title: Week 5-6
timeline.description: Production build, integrations, and QA hardening.

pricing.name: Starter
pricing.description: Core assistant with 3 high-impact flows and launch support.

pricing.name: Growth
pricing.description: Expanded flow library, richer animation system, analytics dashboard.

pricing.name: Scale
pricing.description: Multi-language, CRM automation, and experimentation framework.

team.title: Strategy Lead
team.description: Owns problem framing, scope clarity, and success metric alignment.

team.title: Conversation Designer
team.description: Designs dialogue logic, guardrails, and fallback behavior.

team.title: Motion/UI Designer
team.description: Defines visual language, animation behavior, and interaction polish.

team.title: Implementation Engineer
team.description: Delivers integration, deployment, and operational stability.

nextSteps: Select preferred concept direction and commercial package.
Schedule stakeholder kickoff with product, marketing, and support.
Start discovery sprint and deliver first interactive prototype.
imagePrompts: Hero visual: premium animated chatbot assistant for Notso Demo website experience.
Three-direction moodboard for playful, premium concierge, and expert chatbot styles.
Implementation roadmap visual from discovery to launch and optimization.

slides.title: Animated Chatbot Proposal

slides.title: Client Situation

points: Notso Demo support and pre-sales requests are handled manually and slowly.
Users on https://www.notso.ai do not get immediate guided answers for high-intent questions.
Current chatbot behavior feels static and under-represents the brand quality.

slides.title: Concept Direction
slides.subtitle: The animated chatbot experience we propose.

points: An animated assistant that reflects Notso AI's personality and communication style.
Structured intent paths for discovery, qualification, and support resolution.
Prompt/content system that can be updated fast without reworking the whole UX.
slides.imagePrompt: Implementation roadmap visual from discovery to launch and optimization.

slides.title: Experience Design
slides.subtitle: How the assistant should look and feel.
slides.purpose: Translate brand into interface and motion.
points: Premium motion language with smooth entrance and clear state transitions.
Low-cognitive-load layout: concise prompts, progressive disclosure, decisive CTA placement.
Accessibility-first defaults for contrast, keyboard flow, and reduced motion.

points: Welcome sequence introduces value and routes users in two turns.
Intent map covers product discovery, pricing qualification, and support triage.
Escalation path hands over transcript and context to a human operator.

slides.title: Solution Architecture
slides.subtitle: Core system components and integrations.
points: Shared conversation layer across website widget and in-product assistant.
Editable knowledge base and scripted prompts managed through a lightweight CMS.
Analytics instrumentation for completion rates, escalations, and conversion impact.
